Title: Accessing the QuickBooks (QB) company file database for RSPMD
Notes: Assisted the user with accessing the QuickBooks (QB) company file database for RSPMD. The issue occurred because the application was configured to share the company file from another computer, and the account was set to an online account, which prevented proper access. The configuration was updated by switching the account to a local account, re-sharing the QB company file, and ensuring appropriate access permissions. After the changes, the file was successfully accessed from multiple systems, and the QuickBooks application ran without any further issues.
